Details:
Almost 86 percent of diuron (1 mg/L) removed  by ultrafiltration membranes. The percent removals was lower (11 to 30 percent removal) when these membranes encountered higher concentrations (12 mg/L) of diuron.
Increase in transmembrane pressure reduces the percentage removal. The percent removal also decreases with increasing molecular weight cut-off (MWCO).
